push.buffer_not_found: push {provider}: buffer not found — run: pull {provider}
watchdog.triggered: no progress for {timeout}s — stopping search, saving results
cmd.pull.unknown:
unknown provider: {provider}
Available: yandex, spotify, all
cmd.push.unknown:
unknown provider: {provider}
Available: yandex, spotify, all
cmd.creds.unknown:
unknown provider: {provider}
Available: yandex, spotify, all
cmd.creds.empty:
no active creds for {provider}
  Run: pull {provider}
cmd.link.no_spotify:
no Spotify playlists.
  Add: playlists add <url> spotify
cmd.link.no_yandex:
no Yandex playlists.
  Add: playlists add <url> yandex
cmd.link.prompt_yandex: Numbers separated by space, comma or dot:
cmd.run.ambiguous: ambiguous prefix '{prefix}' — {count} matches, be more specific
transfer_service.saved_tracks: saved {count} tracks to DB, searching Spotify...
transfer_service.no_pending: no pending links — add via: link
error.invalid_yandex_url:
invalid Yandex URL format. Expected: /users/LOGIN/playlists/3 or /playlists/uuid
  Got: {url}
error.yandex_uid_missing: YANDEX_UID not set in .env — run: pull yandex && push yandex
error.invalid_spotify_url:
invalid Spotify URL format. Expected: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/ID
  Got: {url}
error.yandex_likes_empty:
liked tracks list is empty or cookies are expired.
  Run: pull yandex && push yandex
error.yandex_cookie_expired:
Yandex returned HTML instead of data — cookies are expired.
  Run: pull yandex && push yandex
error.spotify_client_id_missing:
SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID not set in .env
1. Go to https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard
2. Create app (CLIENT_SECRET not needed for PKCE)
3. Redirect URI: http://127.0.0.1:8888/callback
4. Add to .env: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID=your_id
yandex_puller.browser_opened: browser opened — log in to your account, waiting...
yandex_puller.uid_not_found: uid not found — add YANDEX_UID to .env manually
